message: New email from A&H.Uasc UG Office: BASc student handbook for 2025/26

metadata.subject: BASc student handbook for 2025/26
metadata.preview:
Dear new and returning BAScers,



Now that the 2025/26 academic year has formally begun, please find attached a copy of this year’s BASc student handbook. You can also view this on the DT Moodle
